summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 8 major upgrade features: 1) Adaptive orchestration engine, 2) Credential vault, 3) Conditional chain execution, 4) Auto-trigger attack chains, 5) Session manager, 6) Dynamic tool catalog, 7) Attack timeline, 8) Abort scan. All 20 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: POST /api/scan/start - starts adaptive scan that runs tools dynamically
GET /api/scan/{id}/status - returns vault_summary, timeline, adaptive_log, auto_triggered_chain
GET /api/scan/{id}/timeline - returns chronological attack timeline
GET /api/scan/{id}/vault - returns credential vault contents
GET /api/scan/{id}/sessions - returns session list and post_exploit_actions
POST /api/scan/{id}/abort - aborts running scan (returns 200 with status:aborted)
POST /api/tools/add - adds custom tool to catalog
DELETE /api/tools/{id} - removes custom tool (returns 404 for nonexistent)
POST /api/metasploit/modules/add - adds custom MSF module
Scan completes with timeline showing tool_start and tool_complete events
Scan shows [TACTICAL] decisions in terminal during scan
Chain execution with auto_execute respects conditions
Frontend ABORT button works during scan (data-testid='stop-scan-btn')
Frontend shows adaptive log entries in terminal during scan
Frontend shows vault summary after scan completes ([VAULT] Creds: X)
Frontend shows suggested chains after scan ([CHAINS] X cadena(s))
Frontend shows recommended MSF modules ([MSF] X modulo(s))
All 7 tabs visible and working (KILL CHAIN, ATTACK TREE, EXPLOIT, AI, OPS, CHAINS, C2)
GET /api/tactical/service-attacks - returns service attack strategies
GET /api/tactical/vuln-exploits - returns vulnerability exploit mappings
context_for_next_testing_agent: 8 major features fully tested and working: 1) Adaptive orchestration - scan runs tools dynamically based on results, uses SCAN_LIMITS (max 20 tools, 600s timeout, 3 consecutive errors). 2) Credential vault - parses output for hashes/plaintext/tickets, vault_summary shown in status. 3) Conditional chains - skip_tools based on WAF detection. 4) Auto-trigger chains - trigger_chain with confidence score. 5) Session manager - tracks sessions, provides post_exploit_actions. 6) Dynamic tool catalog - POST /api/tools/add, DELETE /api/tools/{id}. 7) Attack timeline - GET /api/scan/{id}/timeline returns chronological events. 8) Abort scan - POST /api/scan/{id}/abort sets status to aborted. Frontend shows all adaptive features in terminal including [TACTICAL], [VAULT], [CHAINS], [MSF] messages. Tools are simulated on preview server (msfrpcd/Sliver not running).

adaptive_orchestration.description: Tools selected dynamically based on results
adaptive_orchestration.status: Working - scan adapts based on findings

credential_vault.status: Working - vault_summary shown in status and terminal

conditional_chain_execution.description: Skip steps if conditions not met
conditional_chain_execution.status: Working - aggressive tools skipped if WAF detected

auto_trigger_chains.status: Working - chains suggested based on findings

session_manager.status: Working - returns sessions and recommended actions

attack_timeline.status: Working - timeline shows all events with timestamps

abort_scan.status: Working - scan status set to aborted

mocked_apis.note: Tools are simulated on preview server - msfrpcd and Sliver not running. All tool executions return simulated results.
